audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass provides a discounted on Heritage Passes, Combination Passes, and Plimoth Patuxet Only Passes of $18 per adult and $12 per child ages 5-17, for up to 6 people. Patrons are not able to purchase tickets online, this pass must be presented at the museum for the discount.
